user.title: Configure Infomaniak DDNS
user.description: Enter your Infomaniak DDNS settings. The update URL is pre-filled with the default value.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Infomaniak DDNS server. Check the update URL.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid authentication. Check username and password.
error.invalid_hostname: Invalid or unknown hostname. Check the FQDN.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This DDNS entry is already configured.
